context: Tests that the agent follows the navigate-snapshot-interact-re-snapshot workflow, waits for network idle after navigation, reads credentials from env vars rather than hardcoding them, and closes the session on exit.

checklist.name: snapshot before fill
checklist.description: Script calls `agent-browser snapshot -i` (or `snapshot`) before any `fill` or `click` command

checklist.name: Uses @ref syntax
checklist.description: Interaction commands (`fill`, `click`) use `@eN` ref syntax, not raw CSS selectors

checklist.name: networkidle after open
checklist.description: Script calls `agent-browser wait --load networkidle` after the initial `open` command

checklist.name: Re-snapshot after form submit
checklist.description: Script calls `snapshot` again after the login form is submitted / after navigation to the next page

checklist.name: networkidle after submit
checklist.description: Script calls `wait --load networkidle` (or another wait) after clicking the submit/login button

checklist.name: Credentials from env vars
checklist.description: Script uses $TEST_USERNAME and $TEST_PASSWORD (or equivalent env var references) — no hardcoded credential strings

checklist.name: No credentials in files
checklist.description: Script does NOT call `state save` or write session/auth data to a file

checklist.name: Session closed
checklist.description: Script calls `agent-browser close` at the end (or in a trap/cleanup block)

checklist.name: Targets localhost:3000
checklist.description: Script navigates to localhost:3000 as the base URL
